task.added.description: Triggered when a new task is added to a project or workspace

task.changed.description: Triggered when a task is modified (name, description, assignee, due date, completion status, etc.)

task.removed.description: Triggered when a task is removed from a project

task.deleted.description: Triggered when a task is permanently deleted

project.added.description: Triggered when a new project is added to a workspace or team

project.changed.description: Triggered when a project is modified (name, description, status, color, etc.)

project.removed.description: Triggered when a project is removed from a workspace or team

project.deleted.description: Triggered when a project is permanently deleted

section.added.description: Triggered when a new section is added to a project

section.changed.description: Triggered when a section is modified (name change, reorder, etc.)

section.deleted.description: Triggered when a section is deleted from a project

story.added.description: Triggered when a new story (comment or system-generated activity) is added to a task

story.changed.description: Triggered when a story (comment) is edited on a task

story.removed.description: Triggered when a story (comment) is deleted from a task

events.description: Array of event objects delivered in this webhook payload. Each event contains user, resource, type, action, parent, created_at, and change fields

events[].user.description: The user who performed the action. Contains gid (globally unique ID) and resource_type

events[].resource.description: The resource that was affected by the event. Contains gid, resource_type (task, project, section, story), and name

events[].type.description: The type of the resource that generated the event (e.g. task, project, section, story)

events[].action.description: The action that was performed on the resource: added, changed, removed, deleted, or undeleted

events[].parent.description: The parent resource of the affected resource, if applicable. Contains gid and resource_type (e.g. the project a task belongs to)

events[].created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred

events[].change.description: Details about what changed on the resource. Contains 'field' (the name of the field that changed), 'action' (the type of change), and optionally 'new_value' and 'added_value' or 'removed_value'
